content:
FINAL ENTERPRISE EXECUTION — IVX HOLDINGS
OWNER APPROVED
MODE: EXECUTE ONLY
NO MORE PLANNING
NO PLACEHOLDERS
NO SAMPLE DATA
NO DEMO DATA
NO NARRATIVE

MISSION

Complete IVX Holdings as a true enterprise-grade production platform. Do not stop until every production workflow has been audited, verified live, deployed if required, and backed by evidence. If anything cannot be verified, mark it BLOCKED with the exact technical reason. Never fabricate proof.

==================================================
1. PRODUCTION DATA INTEGRITY
==================================================

Audit every production table.

Remove or archive:

• Demo users
• Proof users
• Test members
• Fake investors
• Fake buyers
• Fake JV deals
• Placeholder wallets
• Sample transactions
• Dummy notifications
• Test conversations

Keep ONLY real production records.

Verify:

✓ Members
✓ Investors
✓ Buyers
✓ JV Deals
✓ Private Lenders
✓ Tokenized Investments
✓ Wallets
✓ Treasury
✓ Ledger

==================================================
2. MEMBER LIFE CYCLE
==================================================

Verify end-to-end:

Registration

Email verification

Phone verification

SMS verification

Login

Forgot password

Reset password

Profile update

Profile picture

KYC

Investor upgrade

Wallet creation

Investment

Withdrawal

Wire transfer

Account archive

Account restore

Freeze

Suspend

Unfreeze

Audit every step.

==================================================
3. MONEY PROTECTION
==================================================

Verify:

✓ No account with money can be deleted
✓ Archive instead of delete
✓ Immutable ledger
✓ Double approval withdrawals
✓ Wire approval workflow
✓ Treasury reconciliation
✓ Audit trail
✓ Recovery process
✓ Transaction history
✓ No negative balances

==================================================
4. INVESTMENT SYSTEM
==================================================

Verify:

Members

Investors

Buyers

JV Deals

Private Lenders

Tokenized Investments

ROI calculations

Ownership %

Capital balances

Profit distributions

Exit workflow

Document management

Electronic signatures

==================================================
5. LANDING PAGE
==================================================

Fix completely:

✓ No jumping
✓ No CLS
✓ No layout shift
✓ No empty cards
✓ Responsive
✓ Fast loading
✓ Real property data
✓ Registration
✓ Videos
✓ Images
✓ Search
✓ Filters

Deploy.

Verify live.

==================================================
6. OWNER AI
==================================================

Verify IVX IA can answer:

Who are you

Who owns IVX

Company information

Projects

Investments

ROI

Risk

JV Deals

Private Lenders

Tokenization

Wallet

Withdrawals

Real production information only.

==================================================
7. ADMIN
==================================================

Verify:

Owner Dashboard

Members

Investors

Buyers

JV

Wallet

Treasury

Ledger

Notifications

Variables

Analytics

Security

Audit

Deploy

Everything functional.

==================================================
8. SECURITY
==================================================

Verify:

GitHub

Render

Supabase

AWS

Variables

Secrets

Encryption

Owner Authentication

Role-based permissions

Audit logging

Backup

Recovery

==================================================
9. ENTERPRISE READINESS
==================================================

Confirm:

100M+ user architecture

High availability

Monitoring

Alerts

Crash recovery

Disaster recovery

Database backup

Rollback

API monitoring

Performance metrics

==================================================
10. FINAL LIVE PROOF
==================================================

Return ONLY verified production evidence.

Include:

GitHub SHA

Render Deploy ID

Boot Time

Health Endpoint

Version Endpoint

Database Connected

Supabase Connected

AWS Connected

Landing Verified

Registration Verified

Login Verified

Password Reset Verified

Members Count

Investors Count

Buyers Count

JV Deals Count

Private Lenders Count

Tokenized Count

Wallet Count

Treasury Count

Ledger Count

Withdrawals Count

Wire Count

Notifications Count

Owner Dashboard Verified

Owner AI Verified

Public AI Verified

Android Verified

iOS Verified

Web Verified

Security Verified

Audit Verified

Performance Verified

==================================================
FINAL ACCEPTANCE
==================================================

The project is COMPLETE only when:

✓ Every workflow has been verified against the live production environment.
✓ No fake/demo/test data remains in production.
✓ Every money workflow is protected.
✓ Every admin workflow is operational.
✓ Every investor workflow is operational.
✓ Landing page is stable.
✓ Members, Investors, Buyers, JV Deals, Private Lenders, Tokenized Investments, Wallet, Treasury, Ledger, Withdrawals, and Wire Transfers are fully functional.
✓ GitHub commit, Render deployment, and live endpoints match.
✓ Every claim is supported by live evidence.

If any item cannot be completed or verified, DO NOT mark COMPLETE. Mark it BLOCKED and include the exact endpoint, file, permission, dependency, or runtime condition preventing completion.
